description: Create a Marine Mammal Observer (MMO) calibration scenario named 'm) MMO Calibration' in '/opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/' consisting of environment.ini, ownship.ini, and othership.ini files. The environment should use the 'Solent' setting with daylight (08:00-16:00), visibility >=10nm, and weather <=1. The ownship 'Ocean Explorer' must be positioned at 50.7000 N, 1.3000 W, heading 090 True, at 0 knots. Include four stationary 'Buoy-Can-Black' (or similar) targets at the following relative positions to the ownship: 500m dead ahead, 500m starboard beam, 1000m port beam, and 200m dead astern. Calculate the coordinates for these targets and save them to '/home/ga/Documents/calibration_card.txt'.
